[i]Infusion[/i] — At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

Return up to one target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Then if you've spent no mana to cast spells this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
Incantation 5 [i](if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 5 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)[/i]

You may look at the top card of your library at any time.
You may cast instant and sorcery cards from the top of your library.
{U}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.
Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, you may cast a copy of one of those cards. This ability triggers only once each turn.

Choose up to five target cards in your graveyard. Target opponent separates them into two piles. Put a pile of your choice into your hand.
Exile Coven's Offering.

At the beginning of your upkeep, put a hunger counter on Refined Taste then mill cards equal to the number of hunger counters on it. You may return a card milled this way to your hand, by paying life equal to the number of hunger counters on Refined Taste.

Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Each creature put onto the battlefield this way explores and gains haste until end of turn.
Incantation 3 [i](if you cast this from your hand, exile it with 3 time counters. Remove one at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, cast this without paying its mana cost.)[/i]

At the beginning of your end step, create a 0/1green Egg creature token with “When this creature dies, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.”
{1}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

Flying
When Sanctwhale of Prayer enters, if it entered from a graveyard, transform it.
{3}{W}: Transform Sanctwhale of Prayer.
cards.flavor_text: [i]They listen to every prayer of Elyndor, but to prayers of underworld they are deaf.[/i]
cards.rules_text2:
Flying, vigilance
Whenever Reborn Sanctwhale attacks, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.

cards.rules_text: When this creature dies, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

Flying, haste
Whenever Albino Dreadkite attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may have Albino Dreadkite deal 3 damage to any non player target. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.

Althea has First strike as long as she is attacking.
Whenever Althea attacks, create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token that is tapped and attacking.

Whenever Gore Omadi enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you do, draw a card.
Whenever another creature or artifact you control dies, target opponent loses 1 life.

Vigilance, trample
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in random order.

Ward—Pay 3 life
When Eclipsed Tormentor enters, target opponent creates a red enchantment token named Agony with: “You can't gain life. Whenever you cast a spell, Agony deals 1 damage to you for each spell you've cast this turn.”.
You can't gain life. Whenever you cast a spell, Agony deals 1 damage to you for each spell you've cast this turn.

Menace
{3}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to your hand
cards.flavor_text: [i]Rotbound Paladins always rise again for their covenant due to its blessing. Some call it a curse.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Destroy target nonland permanent with mana value 3 or less.
[i]Infusion[/i] — If you gained life this turn, destroy up to 4 target nonland permanents with total mana value 3 or less instead.

Flash
Flying
When Wish Granting Priest enters, if you cast it, you may play an instant or sorcery card you own from outside the game this turn.
This land is a Plains, Island, Swamp, Mountain, and Forest.
At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library. You may create a 1/1 blue and red Elemental creature token with prowess. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.

Old One's Tomb enters the battlefield tapped with 10 slumber counters and a stun counter.
{T}: Add {C}{C}. Old One's Tomb deals 2 damage to you.
Whenever a creature dies, remove a slumber counter from Old One's Tomb. Then if it has no counters on it, it becomes a 7/7 black God Horror creature with menace and “Whenever this attacks each opponent losses 7 life”.

{T}: Add {C}.
{6}: This land becomes a 5/5 creature with vigilance and all creature types, it gains: “Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card, then draw a card. “. It's still a land.
When Mysterious Challenger enters, search your library for an artifact card reveal it, put it into your hand. Shuffle. If that card is an equipment, you may put it onto the battlefield instead.

Time loop[i](As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Remove them all after III.)[/i]
I — You mill three cards.
II — Return a creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand.
III — You gain 2 life.
cards.special_text:
Time loop[i](As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Remove them all after III.)[/i]
I — You mill three cards.
II — Return a creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand.
III — You gain 2 life.

cards.rules_text:
Flying
At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Then if that creature has power 4 or greater create a 1/1 white Human Knight creature token.
The first time you attack each turn, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

Look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a land card from among them onto the battlefield tapped and another card into your hand. If you did not put a land onto the battlefield this way, you may put two cards in your hand instead. Shuffle.

Flash
Whenever Aelun enters or attacks and at the beginning of your upkeep, you may draw a card. Then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

Enchant creature 
Whenever enchanted creature deals damage to an opponent, you may draw a card.
Flying

Feral 2 [i](At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 2 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.)[/i]
Reach, deathtouch
At the beginning of your end step, if this creature is feral put a +1/+1 counter on it.

Feral 3 [i](At the beginning of your end step, if sources you control dealt 3 or more damage to one of your opponents this turn and this creature is not feral, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it becomes feral.)[/i]
At the beginning of your end step for each counter on Forest Protector you may exile the top card of your library. You may play cards exiled this way until end of your next turn.
